economic_notes: Investment in Lower Mattagami Energy Limited Partnership (25% of limited partnership units, 6 hydro-electric generating stations). 25% share ownership in Kimesskanemenow Limited Partnership (winter road construction and maintenance). Moose Cree Group of Companies LP, Moose Cree Group GP Ltd, 1929319 Ontario Inc., and Moose Cree Constructors Inc. are government business enterprises. Detour Gold revenue of $7,951,958. DeBeers revenue of $766,573.
notes: Auditor's report dated August 23, 2022, over a year after fiscal year end March 31, 2021. Three fully consolidated subsidiaries: Moose Cree Education Authority, Amisk-OO-Skow Finance Corporation, Moose Cree Training and Employment Unit Inc. Four GBEs on modified equity basis: Moose Cree Group of Companies LP, Moose Cree Group GP Ltd, 1929319 Ontario Inc., Moose Cree Constructors Inc. Portfolio investments of $140,908,262 in LMLP recorded at cost (not equity method). Total government transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + Federal other + Province of Ontario = 25331117+841860+201007+8047997=34421981. Funds held in trust with Government of Canada: $30,640.
